subcodes.first_line: O Mustafa! Bear thou witness within thyself that He is God; there is none other God but Him, the Sovereign, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مصطفی ان اشهد فی نفسک بانه هو الله لا اله الا هو السلطان المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
